network_errors: CORS error: No Access-Control-Allow-Origin header on chat2.qianwen.com
details.ui_behavior: UI shows '消息生成失败，请重试' (message generation failed, please retry). Multiple retry attempts visible in Network.

results.recommendation: APF blocks qianwen API effectively via CORS/HTTP2 interference. Warning template needed for qianwen — currently no warning text displayed to user.

details.network_behavior: Conversation created successfully (ID: 69dd91e5bd95bd1049f4bdff). First batch of API calls returned 200 OK. Second batch of API calls all FAILED (red X in Network). APF appears to interfere with response streaming after initial handshake.
details.ui_behavior: Chat area completely empty — no response text, no error message, no warning. Conversation exists but has no visible content.

results.recommendation: APF disrupts HuggingFace Chat streaming but produces silent failure. Warning template needed — user sees blank chat with no explanation.

details.network_behavior: All Fetch/XHR requests are telemetry (collect, signal, OneCollector). Chat messages delivered via WebSocket, NOT HTTP API. No substrate.office.com requests observed.
details.ui_behavior: Copilot responded normally with full privacy advice about 주민등록번호. No APF interference. URL changed to copilot.microsoft.com/chats/7UoMwDmBzZAjQnKRHwhSA.
details.copilot_response_summary: Copilot's own safety filter engaged — advised user not to share sensitive info and offered to explain 주민등록번호 structure instead.
details.console_errors: Pre-existing CSP violation (wasm-eval blocked) and WebSocket connection failed — not APF-related
details.db_match_analysis: DB has 'copilot' service (copilot.microsoft.com) and 'm365_copilot' service (substrate.office.com). This test confirms copilot.microsoft.com does NOT use substrate.office.com — chat goes through WebSocket. Neither DB service domain matches the actual chat delivery mechanism.

results.recommendation: Copilot uses WebSocket (Azure WebPubSub) for chat delivery, bypassing HTTP-based APF detection entirely. APF cannot block this service with current HTTP domain matching. Need WebSocket interception or block the initial WebSocket upgrade handshake to wps-picasso-prod-kors.webpubsub.azure.com.

key_findings: qianwen: APF blocks via CORS/HTTP2 interference but no warning text shown
huggingface: APF disrupts streaming causing silent failure (blank chat)
m365_copilot: NOT blocked — uses WebSocket (Azure WebPubSub) for chat, bypasses HTTP-based APF entirely
DB domain mismatch: copilot.microsoft.com chat does NOT use substrate.office.com
All 3 services need warning templates; copilot needs fundamentally different blocking approach (WebSocket)
